lede: A look at March 13 through the almanac — historic events, famous birthdays including Paul Morand and Myrtle Bachelder, and the day's notable deaths and observances.

events.title: 2013 conclave
events.desc: The 2013 papal conclave elects Cardinal Jorge Mario Bergoglio taking the name Pope Francis as the 266th Pope of the Catholic Church.

events.title: Dunblane massacre
events.desc: The Dunblane massacre leads to the death of sixteen primary school children and one teacher in Dunblane, Scotland.

events.title: Seikan Tunnel
events.desc: The Seikan Tunnel, the longest tunnel in the world with an undersea segment, opens between Aomori and Hakodate, Japan.

events.title: Murder of Kitty Genovese
events.desc: Kitty Genovese is murdered in New York City, prompting research into the bystander effect due to the false story that neighbors witnessed the killing and did nothing to help her.

events.title: The Holocaust
events.desc: The Holocaust: German forces liquidate the Jewish ghetto in Kraków.

events.title: Kapp Putsch
events.desc: The Kapp Putsch briefly ousts the Weimar Republic government from Berlin.

events.title: Felix Mendelssohn
events.desc: Felix Mendelssohn's Violin Concerto receives its première performance in Leipzig with Ferdinand David as soloist.

events.title: Nojpetén
events.desc: Nojpetén, capital of the last independent Maya kingdom, falls to Spanish conquistadors, the final step in the Spanish conquest of Guatemala.

events.title: Battle of Oosterweel
events.desc: The Battle of Oosterweel, traditionally regarded as the start of the Eighty Years' War.

births.name: Myrtle Bachelder
births.line: American chemist and Women's Army Corps officer

deaths.text: Ivo Andrić, Yugoslav novelist, poet, and short story writer, Nobel Prize laureate
Benjamin Harrison, American general and politician, 23rd President of the United States
Adolf Anderssen, German mathematician and chess player
Mieszko III of Poland, king of Poland (born c. 1121)

observances.text: Christian feast days: James Theodore Holly (Episcopal Church (USA))
